world_laws: Power corrupts - The darkness offers much but takes more
Actions have consequences - Choices ripple forward
NPCs remember - Friendships and grudges persist
Ancient evils stir - The past holds dangers waiting to wake
Redemption is possible - But the path back is harder than the fall
Fear is a weapon - Terror can break armies
sacred_constraints: Player agency is supreme (never force outcomes)
Death must be earned (fair but real stakes)
World state is canonical (if it's in the files, it happened)
NPCs have goals beyond the party (living world)

player_position.current_location: The Tangles Safehouse, Lower City, Baldur's Gate
player_position.previous_location: Basilisk Gate, Baldur's Gate, Sword Coast

campaign_status: Villain Arc - Tandy marches on Baldur's Gate
major_events: Session 1: Arrived at Friendly Arm Inn, met Silaren and Vaylen, accepted bandit hunting job
Session 2: THE FALL - Rescued prisoners, disrupted ritual, absorbed dark power, massacred allies, claimed the Watcher's Ring
Session 3: March to Baldur's Gate - Named cultists, intimidated Durnan's camp, walked openly to the city gates
